channel.title: Soulaani Blue Blog
channel.description: Stories, updates, and reflections from Soulaani Blue's journey.

item.title: From Classroom Cover to Healing Anthem: The Story of "Operator"
The Song That Chose Me: The Story of "Rather Be"
item.description: There are songs you write and then there are songs that write you. "Rather Be" is the second kind. I wrote the first verse in a rented room at Ms. Caldwell's house. I'd been forced out of my old apartm...

item.title: Same (Ole Lady)
item.description: I wrote this because I got tired of lying to myself. "This what I get for not having the words." I couldn't say what I felt when it mattered. I couldn't apologize until years after she was already gone. ...

item.title: The Flower That Grew Into a Song (Repeat)
item.description: I wrote the first lines of "Repeat" in 2023, sitting on a friend's couch with nowhere else to go. Back then, all I had was a few words, a feeling, and a melody humming in my head during sleepless nights. Creating art in crisis feels impo...

item.title: Why I Left YouTube
item.description: I moved my videos to Odysee because I couldn't keep feeding a platform that profits from harm. YouTube's parent company has its hands in too much that goes against my values. Odysee isn't perfect, but it's creator-friendly and respects the audience. ...

item.title: February: First Sales, First Donations, and 'Dead Man Walkin''
item.description: February was heavy. The world kept spinning in its same cruel way. Bombs dropping. ICE murdering people in the streets. The US invading Venezuela and threatening half the planet. Same machine, different day. But here's what e...
